nasb.text: I have put My words in your mouth and have covered you with the shadow of My hand, to establish the heavens, to found the earth, and to say to Zion, ‘You are My people.’ ”

esv.text: And I have put my words in your mouth and covered you in the shadow of my hand, establishing the heavens and laying the foundations of the earth, and saying to Zion, ‘You are my people.’”

cnv.text: 我把我的話放在你的口裡， 用我的手影蔽護你， 好立定諸天，奠定大地的根基， 對錫安說：‘你是我的子民。’”

ccb.text: 我把我的话传给你， 用我的手庇护你。 我铺展穹苍，奠立大地的根基， 对锡安说，‘你是我的子民。’”

csbs.text: 我把我的话语放在你口中， 用我手的荫庇遮盖你； 我安置诸天， 奠定大地的根基， 并对锡安说：‘你是我的子民。’”
